Package com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api

The TTman Server API provides remote access to the test management and execution capabilities of TTworkbench.

See: Description

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    BatchExecuteJob
    Handle for a batch execution job (e.g.
    CampaignStatus  
    ExecuteCampaignJob
    Handle for campaign execution job
    ExecuteControlJob
    Handle for control execution
    ExecuteTestCaseJob
    Handle for testcase execution
    ICampaignExecution
    Represents a job queue for executing test campaigns.
    ICampaignExecutionHandler
    Campaign execution events
    IExecutionBase
    Common API to access both the TTman Execution Server and TTman Execution Queue remotely.
    IExecutionHandler
    Interface for asynchronous feedback from the TTman server to the client.
    IExecutionServer
    Main API to access the TTman Execution Server remotely.
    IProjectManager  
    IProjectPublisher
    Project publish service
    ITERequest
    Requests are triggered by the test execution via SUT actions or TTlibrary functions as messageBox and timedMessageBox.
    ITEResponse
    Response for the question asked by the test execution.
    Job
    A handler for execution server tasks.
    Status
    Response status used for ITEResponse.
    TestCaseStatus
    Execution status for a given test case.
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    BaseExecutionJobStatus  
    Credentials
    Container for user credentials: login and password.
    DefaultHandler
    Empty implementation of ICampaignExecution.
    ExecutionServerFactory
    Create remote execution client and local execution server instances using interfaces.
    ExecutorCapability  
    ExecutorRequirements
    Describes a set of properties for a TTman Server instance.
    JobRegistry
    Job registry maps job ID to the job object.
    LogPacket  
    Parameter
    Describes an encoded TTCN-3 module parameter or test case parameter.
    ProxyHandler
    Utility class that forwards all calls to the given handler.
    TestCampaign  
    TestCase
    Container for test case name and module.
    TestCaseStatusImpl
    Test case status implementation
    Verdict
    Container for verdict reason and kind
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    ExecutionServerMode  
    ITERequest.Kind
    Kinds of Request, for example, cancel, input, message or selection
    JobKind
    JobKind describes the job kind :
    JobStatus
    Job state describes the status of the job running on the server.
    StatusKind
    Describes the status response kind
    VerdictKind
    Describes a TTCN-3 test case verdict kind as defined by the TTCN-3 core standard.
  • Exception Summary 
    Exception Description
    AuthenticationException
    Exception thrown if a user is not allowed to call a function or login incorrect.

Package com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api Description

The TTman Server API provides remote access to the test management and execution capabilities of TTworkbench. A large set of operations are supported by it's Java and XML APIs:
  • Test configuration (campaign selection, module and test case parameters)
  • Process environment setup (environment and JavaVM arguments)
  • Test case and control part execution
  • Log retrieval
Use the ExecutionServerFactory.createClient(java.net.InetAddress, int) to create a new client instance. IExecutionServer client = new ExecutionServerFactory().createClient(); Please import the TTman Client example or consult the API documentation for further implementation details.
Since:
TTworkbench 15
